title: BetterBlockZ: DecorZ
description: A decorative addon for BetterBlockZ that adds custom-modeled blocks.
body:
# BetterBlockZ: DecorZ

**Custom model decorative blocks add-on for BetterBlockZ.**

### BLOCK FEATURES and MECHANICS:

Cyber Lights

Full-bright decorative light fixtures with flexible placement and modular building options.

Modular Blocks

- Panel
- Cut Panel
- Strip
- Place side-by-side to create seamless custom light layouts.
- Sneak-place to start a separate connection network.
  
Multi-Face Stacking

- Plate
- Cover
- Flat Lamp
- Hexagon Lamp
- Up to 6 can occupy a single block space.
- Supports placement on the floor, ceiling, and all four walls.
  
Omni-Directional Blocks

- Lantern
- Quad Lantern
- Can be attached to floors, walls, and ceilings.
  
Number Decals

- Flat number decals.
- Right-click to cycle numbers from 0-9.
- Can be placed on all sides of a block.
- Placement rotation adjusts automatically based on facing.
  
Placement & Building Support

- Blocks do not require support and will not break when floating.
- Supports rotation and mirroring for easier use with tools like Building Gadgets.

**More blocks coming in future updates!**
